flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 11 pp at George Stone Technical College vs the 2003–2007 baseline (50.9% vs 62.2%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at George Stone Technical College rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 (61.8% → 71.0%).
